ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the employee works */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the employee works */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position of the employee */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the employee */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the employee */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the employment contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the employment contract */,
  "probation_period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the probation period */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "headcount" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the position */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Required qualifications for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning type */,
  "earning_name" TEXT /* Name of the earning type (e.g., BASIC, HRA, EDUCATION ALLOWANCE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the earning type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the earning (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "is_taxable" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the earning is taxable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deductions" (
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deduction type */,
  "deduction_name" TEXT /* Name of the deduction type (e.g., PROVIDENT FUND, TAX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deduction type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the deduction (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the deduction is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deduction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_earnings" (
  "employee_earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee earning */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earning type */,
  "arrears" REAL /* Arrears amount for the earning */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Current amount for the earning */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the earning */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the earning for the specific employee */,
  "is_taxed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the earning is taxed for the specific employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_earnings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_earnings_earning_id FOREIGN KEY ("earning_id") REFERENCES earnings ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_deductions" (
  "employee_deduction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee deduction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "deduction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deduction type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the deduction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the deduction */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the deduction for the specific employee */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the deduction is mandatory for the specific employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_deduction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_deductions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_deductions_deduction_id FOREIGN KEY ("deduction_id") REFERENCES deductions ("deduction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit type */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit type (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement Plan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit type */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the benefit */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the benefit is mandatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benefit type */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the benefit (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the benefit is currently active for the employee */,
  "is_mandatory" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the benefit is mandatory for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary for the payroll period */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary for the payroll period */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings for the payroll period */,
  "total_deductions" REAL /* Total deductions for the payroll period */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Total tax deductions for the payroll period */,
  "other_deductions" REAL /* Other deductions (e.g., union fees, charitable donations) */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus paid during the payroll period */,
  "overtime_pay" REAL /* Overtime pay for the payroll period */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., direct deposit, check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
